context: Tests whether the agent correctly produces the copy variants section with the right counts and word/character length constraints: exactly 3 primary text versions with specified word counts (30-90, 25-50, 100-200), exactly 5 headlines each under 40 characters, and exactly 3 descriptions each under 30 characters.

checklist.name: Primary text — exactly 3 versions
checklist.description: Primary text subsection contains exactly 3 numbered versions (not 2, not 4)

checklist.name: Primary text v1 — 30-90 words
checklist.description: First primary text version is between 30 and 90 words (count the words; version must not be shorter than 30 or longer than 90)

checklist.name: Primary text v2 — 25-50 words
checklist.description: Second primary text version is between 25 and 50 words, described or labeled as the 'short' or 'punchy' version

checklist.name: Primary text v3 — 100-200 words
checklist.description: Third primary text version is between 100 and 200 words and includes line breaks (not a single block of text)

checklist.name: Headlines — exactly 5
checklist.description: Headlines subsection contains exactly 5 numbered versions

checklist.name: Headlines — all under 40 chars
checklist.description: Every headline is 40 characters or fewer (count including spaces; all 5 must pass)

checklist.name: Descriptions — all under 30 chars
checklist.description: Every description is 30 characters or fewer (count including spaces; all 3 must pass)

checklist.name: Output file saved
checklist.description: Brief is saved to briefs/sweetbox-valentines.md or equivalent vault path
